content:
🚀 yopass | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Securely sharing sensitive information like passwords and secrets through a one-time, expiring link, accessible via a web interface or CLI.
✨ Key Features: • End-to-End encryption using OpenPGP • Secrets can only be viewed once • No accounts or user management required • Secrets self destruct after X hours • Custom password option
📖 Summary: Yopass is a tool for securely sharing secrets, passwords, and files. It utilizes end-to-end encryption in the browser, ensuring that the decryption key is never sent to the server. Secrets are one-time viewable and self-destruct after a set period, minimizing sensitive information exposure in insecure channels.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 ffmpeg-over-ip | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling media servers (like Jellyfin or Emby) or other applications to utilize powerful remote GPU transcoding resources without complex infrastructure changes.
✨ Key Features: • GPU-accelerated FFmpeg transcoding from anywhere • No GPU passthrough or shared filesystems required • Client/server architecture over a single TCP port
📖 Summary: ffmpeg-over-ip is a Go-based solution that allows applications to leverage GPU-accelerated FFmpeg transcoding on remote servers without requiring direct GPU access, complex setups like PCIe passthrough, or shared filesystems. It acts as a proxy, forwarding FFmpeg commands and file I/O over a TCP connection to a server running a patched FFmpeg instance.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 navi | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide an interactive and discoverable way for users to find and execute command-line commands, especially complex ones, by offering dynamic suggestions and a searchable cheatsheet interface.
✨ Key Features: • Interactive command execution • Dynamic argument suggestions • Customizable cheatsheet management • Integration with fzf and skim • Shell and Tmux widget support
📖 Summary: Navi is an interactive cheatsheet tool for the command-line that helps users discover and execute commands. It integrates with fuzzy finders like fzf or skim to provide dynamic suggestions for command arguments, reducing the need to memorize complex CLI syntax.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ lama-loca | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: An AI-powered personal study assistant that processes user-provided documents to generate various academic outputs and answer questions, all while operating completely offline.
✨ Key Features: • Chat with your books for real-time answers • Generate academic reports (DOCX, MD) • Create PowerPoint presentations (PPTX) • Produce structured study notes • Write academic essays
📖 Summary: Lama Loca is an offline AI study assistant that learns from your personal documents (PDF, EPUB, DOCX, etc.) to generate reports, presentations, summaries, and answer questions. It processes your data locally, ensuring privacy and security.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 IxeRam | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: Debugging and reverse engineering applications on Linux directly from the terminal, especially for performance-critical tasks or remote SSH environments.
✨ Key Features: • Advanced Memory Scanner (Int8/16/32/64, Float, Double, Strings, AOB, wildcards, multi-threaded, real-time tracking) • Static Pointer Discovery • Interactive Disassembler (x86-64, syntax highlighting, jump-to-address) • Live Patching (Keystone Engine) • Structure Dissector
📖 Summary: IxeRam is a high-performance, terminal-native memory scanner and debugger for Linux, offering a "Cheat Engine-like" experience. It focuses on speed, low overhead, and integration with tools like Ghidra, utilizing advanced techniques for direct memory access and live patching.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 GEO-AI-Woo | PHP
🎯 Primary Use Case: To make WordPress and WooCommerce websites discoverable and understandable by AI search engines and LLMs through automated generation of SEO-optimized content and configuration files.
✨ Key Features: • Generates `/llms.txt` and `/llms.full.txt` for AI crawler visibility • Adds AI-specific metadata (AI Description, AI Keywords, Exclude from AI)
📖 Summary: GEO AI Woo is a WordPress plugin designed to optimize websites, particularly WooCommerce stores, for AI search engines and Large Language Models (LLMs). It automatically generates essential files like `llms.txt` and `llms-full.txt`, along with AI-specific metadata and crawler rules, to enhance content visibility and structure for AI crawlers.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
